$schema: IronShield control mapping v1 — NIST CSF 2.0–aligned (informal)
deployment_notes: Fill last_reviewed as ISO date when you review. Add deployment-specific rows in overrides (separate file optional).

controls.name: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management
controls.notes: npm audit via security-assurance; vendor SBOM not automated in-repo.

controls.name: Configuration management
controls.notes: Env-based config; formal CMDB is organizational.

controls.name: Identities and credentials for users
controls.notes: JWT + admin_users session_version invalidation; optional JWT_SECRET_PREVIOUS for rotation.

controls.name: Access permissions
controls.notes: RBAC on admin routes; tenant scoping.

controls.name: Data-at-rest protection
controls.notes: DB encryption/TDE is deployment (MySQL/host); app stores secrets in env.

controls.name: Data-in-transit protection
controls.notes: TLS optional in Node; production expects TLS at proxy or Node HTTPS.

controls.name: Incident response preparation
controls.notes: Investigations/playbooks in product; IR process is organizational.

controls.name: Networks monitored
controls.notes: Agent collectors + ingest; scope is Windows agent deployment.

controls.name: Incident management
controls.notes: Alerts, investigations, response actions; formal RSOP external.

controls.name: Administrative action audit trail
controls.notes: Best-effort insert; optional immutable archive and AUDIT_FAILURE_LOG_PATH spill; requestId on admin audit details.
